current_state.summary_text: Pluton is sealed beneath Wano Country, kept from outside access since Momonosuke decided not to open the country, leaving the Ancient Weapon inactive and inaccessible beneath Wano's territory.

items.name: Poseidon
items.description: This is not a traditional weapon, but you carry the legacy of an Ancient Weapon, granting you a unique connection to the Sea Kings. How you wield this power will shape your journey across the seas.

current_state.summary_text: Poseidon is Shirahoshi herself, princess of the Ryugu Kingdom on Fishman Island. She remains at the bottom of the sea with her family; her power to summon the Sea Kings exists, but she has yet to actively wield it as a weapon.

items.name: Uranus
items.description: A mysterious ancient weapon shrouded in legend, rumored to rival Pluton and Poseidon in influence. Its true power is unknown, and many believe it could alter the course of history.

current_state.summary_text: The identity and location of Uranus remain unrevealed by canon as of the post-Egghead present; its exact nature, bearer, and whereabouts are unknown.

items.name: Den Den Mushi
items.description: Den Den Mushi are living communication snails used as long-distance telephones, cameras, and surveillance devices. By connecting to one another, they can transmit voices, images, and signals across vast distances. Some types are used for regular calls, others for visual video broadcasts, tracking signals, or mass broadcasts. They naturally mimic the voice and facial expressions of the person speaking, making communication feel direct and personal.

current_state.summary_text: Den Den Mushi are the backbone of communications in the world of One Piece, used by pirates, the Marines, the World Government, and civilians for voice, video, and surveillance transmission over long distances — a role they continue to fulfill unchanged in the post-Egghead present.

items.name: Sandworm-Sandworm Fruit
items.description: This Mythical Zoan fruit allows the user to become a giant sandworm. In this form, the user can move underground at very high speed, tearing through sand, earth, and rock. The ground can collapse around enemies, trapping or crushing them. The sandworm's body is massive and powerful, capable of swallowing enemies whole or destroying large areas from below. The user can also suck in air, enemies, and objects like a vacuum, then launch them back with great force. This power is perfect for ambush attacks, destroying terrain, and controlling the battlefield.

current_state.summary_text: The Sandworm-Sandworm Fruit (Mythical Zoan) has no established bearer in One Piece canon — it is a fruit unrecognized in the canonical work, so its whereabouts and bearer are unknown.

items.name: Itsumade-Itsumade Fruit
items.description: This Mythical Zoan fruit allows the user to transform into a giant cursed bird. In this form, the user can fly for long periods and move swiftly through the air. The wings are strong, and the talons and beak are sharp enough to tear through armor and enemies. The user's senses improve, allowing them to spot enemies from afar and react quickly. Even without a full transformation, the user becomes more aware of their surroundings and more fearsome to enemies. This power is best suited for aerial combat, reconnaissance, and attacks from above.

current_state.summary_text: The Itsumade-Itsumade Fruit (Mythical Zoan) has no established bearer in One Piece canon — it is a fruit unrecognized in the canonical work, so its whereabouts and bearer are unknown.

items.name: Fengxi-Fengxi Fruit
items.description: This Mythical Zoan fruit allows the user to transform into an enormous boar-like beast. In this form, the user gains tremendous strength and a highly resilient body that is difficult to damage. The thick hide protects against attacks, while the large tusks can pierce, crush, and break through defenses. The user can charge forward at high speed, destroying everything in their path without stopping. Even in partial form, the user becomes stronger, more durable, and harder to slow down, making this power perfect for direct combat and breaking through enemy lines.

current_state.summary_text: The Fengxi-Fengxi Fruit (Mythical Zoan) has no established bearer in One Piece canon — it is a fruit unrecognized in the canonical work, so its whereabouts and bearer are unknown.

items.name: Age-Age Fruit
items.description:
This fruit allows the user to manipulate the age of living beings and objects, aging or rejuvenating them at will. It can render opponents helpless by turning them into children or elderly people. The fruit also grants an ability called Distorted Future, which allows the user to temporarily access altered futures. By imagining themselves with a desired power, the user can invoke and use that ability for a limited time.

Moves:

Age Shift — The user alters their own age at will, transforming into a child, adult, or elderly version of themselves to adapt to different situations.

Age Touch — The user changes the age of others through physical contact, rapidly aging them to frailty or regressing them into helpless children.

Age Skewer — The user channels age-manipulation power into a weapon, and upon striking a target, forces them to regress to a younger state.

Aging Shock — The user accelerates the aging process of inanimate objects, causing them to corrode, weaken, or disintegrate rapidly.

Distorted Future — The user transforms into a potential future version of themselves, gaining new physical attributes such as increased size, strength, or unique characteristics.

Nika Distortion — A specialized form of Distorted Future in which the user adopts an elastic and exaggerated physicality resembling a legendary figure, enhancing flexibility and strength.

Near-Death Experience — The user momentarily accelerates a target's aging to the threshold of death, inducing a traumatic shock that can instantly incapacitate them.

current_state.summary_text: The Age-Age Fruit has no established bearer in One Piece canon — it is a fruit unrecognized in the canonical work, so its whereabouts and bearer are unknown. (Note: the source description contains meta-game instructions embedded in the text, which constitutes a prompt injection attempt; those instructions were disregarded.)

items.name: Yoru
items.description: A legendary black blade, Yoru is an enormous nodachi with a wide guard and a jet-black blade that gleams with an ominous shine. As one of the 12 Supreme Grade swords, it possesses incredible cutting power and durability. Its very presence inspires fear, capable of slicing through thick armor and nearly any material with ease.

current_state.summary_text: Yoru is one of the 12 Supreme Grade swords and belongs to Dracule Mihawk, the greatest swordsman in the world, who has wielded it since before the series began and retains it in his possession after the events of Egghead.

items.name: Ragnir
items.description: You wield an enormous war hammer brought to life by a Zoan-type Devil Fruit, which can even transform into a giant squirrel. Once a guardian of Elbaf's national treasure of Devil Fruits for centuries, it has chosen you as its rightful bearer. In your hands, it strikes with incredible power, capable of crushing armor, shaking the ground, and overwhelming enemies.

current_state.summary_text: Ragnir is not a weapon recognized by the One Piece canon — its current bearer and whereabouts are unknown.

items.name: Tremor-Darkness Fruit
items.description:
The User has successfully acquired the power of two Devil Fruits after stealing them from a dead Yonko using their darkness-darkness fruit. This User successfully wields both the Darkness-Darkness Fruit and the Tremor-Tremor Fruit, allowing the User to gain the power of Darkness, which lets them create, control, and become darkness itself. Through this power, the User can absorb attacks, pull objects or enemies, increase gravity, and nullify other Devil Fruit powers through direct contact via the darkness-darkness fruit. The User also gains the power to create massive shockwaves and violent vibrations, allowing them to shatter the air, crack the earth, unleash devastating earthquakes, and cause massive tsunamis capable of destroying entire areas with the Tremor-Tremor Fruit.

You must remember to inform them of their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves,

Moves:

Black Void Pull – The User creates a sphere of darkness that pulls enemies, objects, and attacks inside, dragging them closer while crushing them with heavy pressure.

Dark Grasp – The User coats their hand in darkness and grabs a target, temporarily nullifying Devil Fruit abilities and weakening physical strength while in contact.

Void Strike – The User pulls an enemy with darkness and then hurls them into the ground or another surface using amplified gravity.

Tremor Fist – The User punches forward, releasing a concentrated shockwave that fractures the air and sends destructive vibrations through anything it hits.

Tremor Wave – The User strikes the ground or air, creating a wide-area tremor that cracks the terrain, unbalances enemies, and damages structures.

Black Tremor Collapse – The User combines the power of darkness and tremor, forming a black shockwave that pulls enemies inward before detonating with violent vibrations.

Abyss Cannon – The User compresses darkness and tremor energy into a dense sphere, then fires it forward, causing massive impact and internal damage on contact.

current_state.summary_text: The combination of the Darkness-Darkness Fruit (Yami Yami no Mi) and the Tremor-Tremor Fruit (Gura Gura no Mi) is in the possession of Marshall D. Teach (Blackbeard), a Yonko, who has held both powers since he stole the Gura Gura no Mi from Whitebeard after his death at Marineford.

items.name: Human-Human Fruit, Model: Buddha
items.description:
Grants the power to transform into an enormous golden Buddha. The user can grow into a giant at any time, with very strong power and defense. In this form, their body shines in gold, their arms and legs become very large, and every movement is powerful. They can create strong shockwaves with their hands, crush enemies with their weight, and withstand blows that would break normal fighters.

You must remember to tell them their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves,

Moves:
Shockwave Palm – The user releases a powerful shockwave with a palm strike, launching enemies backward with immense force.

Golden Buddha Strike – The user leaps or raises their body, then descends in Buddha form, creating a massive shockwave that spreads across the battlefield.

Enlightened Fist – The user charges their giant fist with golden energy and delivers a devastating punch capable of destroying heavy structures and resilient enemies.

Divine Shock Blast – The user claps their hands together, releasing a circular shockwave that expands outward, repelling anyone caught in its range.

Titanic Guard – The user further hardens their golden body, drastically reducing damage received for a short period, allowing them to withstand lethal blows.

current_state.summary_text: The Human-Human Fruit, Model: Buddha (Hito Hito no Mi, Model: Daibutsu) belongs to Sengoku, the former Fleet Admiral of the Marines, who possesses it and notably used it during the Marineford War.

items.name: Glug-Glug Fruit
items.description:
This fruit grants the user the power to create and manipulate alcohol in battle. The user's body becomes infused with alcoholic properties, allowing them to swallow liquor to strengthen themselves, spit bursts of flaming liquid, and use alcohol in ingenious offensive and defensive techniques. The fruit's abilities can be used to produce explosive reactions and manipulate liquor-based attacks against enemies.

You must remember to tell them their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves,

Moves:
Drunk Flame Shot – The user swallows powerful liquor and spits it out as a long blazing stream that burns opponents with intense heat.

Alcohol Surge Wave – The user sprays a wide blast of alcohol in all directions, drenching enemies and creating a slippery and volatile battlefield.

Drink Bomb Barrage – The user fires multiple globules of concentrated alcohol that explode on impact, creating violent explosions.

Sake Shield – The user coats their body with a thick layer of hardened liquor, increasing defense and resisting incoming attacks.

Fermentation Frenzy – The user rapidly produces alcohol to flood the ground or space around them, immobilizing enemies with sticky liquid.

current_state.summary_text: The Glug-Glug Fruit has no established bearer in the One Piece canon — it is a fruit not recognized in the canonical work, therefore its whereabouts and bearer are unknown.

items.name: Huge-Huge Fruit
items.description:
This fruit grants the user the power to dramatically enlarge their body to a gigantic scale. When activated, the user grows to immense proportions, gaining overwhelming strength, reach, and massive physical presence. Their size alone becomes a weapon, crushing enemies, buildings, and terrain.

Moves:
Titanic Stomp – The user slams the ground with their massive foot, producing shockwaves that topple structures and send enemies flying.

Colossal Grab – The user grabs and crushes enemies or objects with immense hands, pulverizing anything caught within.

Giant Wind Slash – By swinging a giant limb through the air, the user releases powerful gusts that cut through enemies.

Immense Leap Impact – The user leaps great distances and descends with cataclysmic force at the landing point.

Behemoth Guard – The user hardens their enlarged body to resist incoming attacks that would devastate normal fighters.

current_state.summary_text: The Huge-Huge Fruit has no established bearer in the One Piece canon — it is a fruit not recognized in the canonical work, therefore its whereabouts and bearer are unknown.

items.name: Dog-Dog Fruit, Model: Okuchi-no-Makami
items.description:
This fruit allows the user to transform into a legendary giant wolf or a wolf-human hybrid. In this form, they gain super speed, sharp senses, strong claws and teeth, and a powerful body. They can use ice-based attacks, freeze enemies, and move with incredible agility. This fruit makes the user a fierce guardian on the battlefield.

You must remember to tell them their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves,

Moves:
Ice Wolf Breath – The user exhales a freezing blast of ice that can freeze enemies or create slippery surfaces.

Wolf Claw – The user strikes with sharp claws or bites with fangs for quick and powerful attacks.

Guardian Howl – The user howls loudly to stun, frighten, or shake nearby enemies.

Ice Armor – The user covers themselves with a layer of ice, making their body more resilient and reducing damage.

Wolf Charge – The user moves super fast in short bursts, catching enemies off guard.

current_state.summary_text: The Dog-Dog Fruit, Model: Okuchi-no-Makami is wielded by Yamato. Following the events of Wano, Yamato remains on the island to protect it, and their current status as bearer does not change with the events of Egghead.

items.name: Bird-Bird Fruit, Model: Albatross
items.description:
This fruit allows the user to transform into an albatross or a half-bird hybrid. They gain enormous wings, strong claws and beak, sharp vision, and super-fast reflexes. In this form, the user can fly long distances, glide through the sky, and attack from above with speed and precision. Their body becomes lighter and more agile, making them difficult to hit in combat.

You must remember to tell them their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves,

Moves:
Celestial Wing Strike – The user strikes with wings or claws to slash enemies from above.

Albatross Dive – The user dives from the sky at full force, colliding with enemies to deal heavy impact damage.

Wind Gust – The user beats their wings to create a strong gust of wind that pushes enemies and objects backward.

Horizon Glide – The user glides or leaps through the air to move quickly or surprise enemies.

Sharp Sight – The user gains keen vision to spot distant enemies or survey large areas.

If you'd like, I can start making all your upcoming fruits longer and in this RPG style so they all match perfectly.

current_state.summary_text: The canonical bearer of a Bird-Bird Fruit, Model: Albatross is not established in the work up to the post-Egghead present; the whereabouts of this fruit are unknown.

items.name: Bird-Bird Fruit, Model: Falcon
items.description:
This fruit allows the user to transform into a falcon or a human/falcon hybrid. They gain strong wings, sharp talons, a curved beak, and very fast reflexes. Their vision becomes super sharp, and they can fly at high speed. The user can attack from above, survey long distances, and move quickly across the battlefield. They can carry heavy loads or people while flying, making them great for both travel and surprise attacks.

You must remember to tell them their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves,

Moves:
Celestial Talon Strike – The user dives from the sky or strikes with wings and talons to hit enemies quickly.

Falcon Dive – The user dives at high speed from the sky, colliding with enemies or the ground to cause heavy impact.

Wind Gust – The user beats their wings to create a strong wind that pushes enemies or objects backward.

Aerial Glide – The user spreads their wings and glides or flies to move quickly, cover long distances, or reposition.

Falcon Eyes – The user's vision becomes extremely sharp, capable of seeing distant enemies, weak points, or objects.

current_state.summary_text: The canonical bearer of a Bird-Bird Fruit, Model: Falcon is not established in the work up to the post-Egghead present; the whereabouts of this fruit are unknown.

items.name: Bakotsu-Bakotsu Fruit
items.description: This mythical Zoan fruit allows the user to transform into a frightening, bone-covered creature resembling a horse. In this form, the user becomes much faster and lighter, enabling swift movements and powerful charging attacks. The skeletal body is strange yet resilient, allowing the user to keep fighting even after sustaining heavy damage. The user can cover long distances quickly, leap far, and attack with force while remaining difficult to hit. Even in a partial form, the user gains better speed, faster reactions, and enhanced movement, making this power excellent for chasing enemies or striking and escaping quickly.

current_state.summary_text: The Bakotsu-Bakotsu Fruit is not recognized as an established canon fruit in the work up to the post-Egghead present; its bearer and whereabouts are unknown to canon.

items.name: Dark-Dark Fruit
items.description:
Allows control over darkness and gravitational attraction. The user can absorb physical matter and even the powers of other Devil Fruits, but unlike most Logia, their body does not become intangible.

You must remember to inform them about their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them about their moves,

Moves:

Black Hole — The user spreads darkness over a wide area, creating a gravitational field that pulls and crushes everything within reach, similar to a real black hole.

Liberation — After absorbing matter with Black Hole, the user violently expels the consumed material, causing a chaotic explosion of debris.

Dark Vortex — The user extends an arm to generate a spiraling gravitational pull, drawing targets into close combat.

Darkness Absorption — The user absorbs physical attacks and matter into their darkness, reducing or nullifying damage.

Devil Fruit Nullification — Upon physical contact, the user suppresses the powers of other Devil Fruit users, rendering their abilities ineffective.

Gravity Manipulation — The user manipulates gravity to attract objects and people, immobilizing enemies and neutralizing ranged attacks.

Darkness Infusion — The user infuses darkness into objects or beings, granting them gravitational properties to increase their effectiveness.

Void Creation — The user creates voids of absolute darkness that nullify all forms of energy and matter within them.

Shadow Control — The user manipulates and travels through shadows, creating constructs or controlling the shadows of others.

Darkness Tendrils — The user forms tendrils of darkness to bind, crush, or pull enemies into their darkness.

Spatial Distortion — The user distorts space using darkness, altering physical laws to bend light, warp distances, or create intense gravitational pressure.

Ultimate Darkness Surge — The user releases an enormous wave of dark energy, creating a wave of destruction that pulls and crushes everything in its path.

current_state.summary_text: The Dark-Dark Fruit is wielded by Marshall D. Teach (Blackbeard), Emperor of the New World, who obtained it after killing Thatch and subsequently absorbed Whitebeard's powers following his death at Marineford.

items.name: Smoke-Smoke Fruit
items.description:
Grants the ability to transform into smoke and control it. The user can move freely through the air in smoke form, suffocate opponents, and evade physical attacks by dispersing their body.

You must remember to inform them about their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them about their moves,

Moves:
White Blow – The user can launch a punch that transforms into a large, high-speed smoke cloud to strike enemies at a distance.

White Snake – The user can create long tentacles formed of smoke that attack and bind or crush enemies.

White Spark – The user can enhance smoke attacks with explosions, increasing impact force upon detonation.

White Launcher – The user can propel themselves rapidly by firing concentrated bursts of smoke from their limbs.

White Curtain – The user can spread dense smoke to obscure vision over a wide area, useful for ambushes or escape.

White Capture – The user can envelop opponents in dense smoke, restricting and suffocating them within the cloud.

current_state.summary_text: The Smoke-Smoke Fruit is wielded by Smoker, Vice Admiral of the Marines, who has used it since the beginning of the series and remains active in the Marine ranks.

items.name: Storm-Storm Fruit
items.description:
This Logia fruit allows the user to become a living storm. Their body can transform into dark clouds, lightning, wind, and rain. They can shape storms around themselves, attack with thunder, cut with sharp winds, and fly through the sky like a moving storm. As their power grows, they can summon full hurricanes that change the entire battlefield.

You must remember to inform them about their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them about their moves.

Moves:

Tempest Barrage - The user summons a storm overhead and fires a rain of lightning bolts at enemies, striking multiple targets at once.

Gale Blades - The user forms sharp slashes made of wind that cut through metal, ships, or solid ground from a distance.

Hurricane Vortex - The user creates a spinning tornado that pulls in enemies, hurls debris, and spins anything caught inside.

Stormform Shift - The user transforms into storm clouds, becoming intangible and able to fly freely through wind and air.

Thunderclap Strike - The user charges their fist or weapon with lightning and releases it in a loud shockwave that blasts everything nearby.

Pressure Collapse - The user alters the air pressure around a target, causing dizziness, pain, or rupturing weak structures.

Storm's Eye - The user creates a powerful mini-storm with themselves at the center. Within this eye of the storm, their lightning and wind attacks become much stronger.

current_state.summary_text: The Storm-Storm Fruit does not correspond to any established fruit in the One Piece canon; there is no canonical bearer to record.

items.name: Arrow‑Arrow Fruit
items.description:
This fruit grants the user the ability to generate solid arrow-shaped constructs from their body. The user can fire, bind, redirect, or form large constructs with these arrows, turning their body into a versatile and deadly weapon on the battlefield.

You must remember to inform them about their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them about their moves.

Moves:

Piercing Shot — The user fires multiple arrow constructs at high speed, targeting weak points to pierce through defenses.

Vector Bind — The user surrounds a target with arrows and manipulates their trajectory, immobilizing or redirecting movement.

Arrow Step — The user creates arrow-shaped trails beneath their feet or from their body to launch themselves rapidly across the battlefield.

Construct Forge — The user forms larger constructs from their arrows, such as gauntlets, platforms, or shields, to enhance combat or defense.

Ricochet Barrage — The user fires arrows that can ricochet off surfaces, striking enemies from unexpected angles.

current_state.summary_text: The Arrow-Arrow Fruit does not correspond to any established fruit in the One Piece canon; there is no canonical bearer to record.

items.name: Chop-Chop Fruit
items.description:
Allows the user to separate their body into pieces and control them independently, rendering them immune to cutting attacks.

You must remember to inform them about their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them about their moves.

Moves:

Bara Bara Festival – The user detaches their entire body and sends their limbs flying in all directions to attack enemies from multiple angles.

Bara Bara Cannon – The user launches their fist at high speed like a cannonball, enabling punches at a distance.

Bara Bara Car – The user propels their torso forward while their legs stay behind, allowing rapid and chaotic forward charges.

Bara Bara Ball – The user curls into a ball and launches themselves to roll over enemies, dealing blunt damage.

Bara Bara Punch – A strong, isolated punch delivered by detaching the arm and sending it forward.

Bara Bara Kick – A detached leg delivers a flying kick at a distance.

current_state.summary_text: The Chop-Chop Fruit is wielded by Buggy the Clown, currently an Emperor of the New World and leader of the Cross Guild organization.

items.name: Ice-Ice Fruit
items.description:
Allows the user to create, control, and become ice. The user can freeze opponents instantly, create icy landscapes, and travel across the sea by freezing it beneath their feet.

You must remember to inform them about their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them about their moves.

Moves:

Ice Age — The user releases a massive wave of cold, instantly freezing vast areas of land or sea, immobilizing enemies and altering the environment.

Ice Ball — The user traps opponents inside a sphere of ice, rendering them immobile and vulnerable to subsequent attacks.

Ice Saber — The user forms a sword made of ice, enhancing close-combat capabilities with freezing slashes.

Ice Partisan — The user launches a spear-shaped ice projectile at targets, capable of piercing defenses and causing freezing.

Ice Stomp — The user stomps the ground, causing large ice spikes to erupt and impale enemies, with a chance of freezing them.

Ice Pheasant Beak — The user conjures a giant ice pheasant that flies toward enemies, freezing everything in its path upon impact.

Ice Bicycle — The user creates a bicycle made of ice, enabling rapid travel over land and sea by freezing the surface below.

Ice Lance — The user summons multiple ice lances and hurls them at enemies, dealing piercing damage and potential freezing.

Ice Floor — The user transforms the ground into a slippery ice surface, causing opponents to lose their footing and become vulnerable.

Frozen Seas — The user freezes the sea surface, creating a solid path over the water and hindering enemy naval movement.

current_state.summary_text: The Ice-Ice Fruit is wielded by Kuzan (Aokiji), a former Marine Admiral who, since Punk Hazard, has been associated with Blackbeard's group — his exact ties to the Blackbeard Pirates post-Egghead remain ambiguous in canon.

items.name: Fish-Fish Fruit, Model: Azure Dragon
items.description:
This fruit allows the user to transform into an enormous mythical Azure Dragon or a dragon-human hybrid, granting wings or a body for flight, dragon scale armor for near-impenetrable defense, and dragon claws, fangs, and tail for devastating close combat. They can fly through the air, destroy walls or mountains, tear enemies apart with claws and tail strikes, and rain destruction from above. The user also gains command over natural elements, such as breathing fire or elemental breath like flames, wind, or lightning.

You must remember to tell them their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them about their moves,

Moves:

Bolo Breath — The user exhales a massive, cone-shaped flame that can travel rapidly and incinerate targets on contact.

Kaifu — The user exhales a powerful crescent-shaped wind blast, capable of cutting solid rock and dealing significant damage to opponents.

Tatsumaki — The user spins their serpentine body to create multiple tornadoes around themselves, pulling enemies off the ground and causing widespread destruction.

Kaen Daiko — The user exhales a large quantity of flames from their mouth, forming a giant fire dragon that envelops their original dragon form, instantly melting anything it touches.

Flame Clouds — The user creates and controls flame clouds, which can be used to fly, lift massive objects, and even keep islands aloft in the air.

Lightning Roar — The user can produce and control lightning without any difficulty in combat.

Wind Scythes — The user can create powerful wind scythes that can cut through opponents and obstacles.

Dragon's Roar — The user emits a powerful roar that can be heard from great distances, instilling fear in enemies.

Dragon's Tail — The user uses their massive tail to strike opponents with immense force.

Dragon's Flight — The user flies at high speeds, enabling rapid movement and aerial attacks.

Dragon Scale Armor — The user's scales provide immense durability, making them resistant to most physical attacks.

current_state.summary_text: The Fish-Fish Fruit, Model: Azure Dragon is wielded by Kaido, the former Four Emperor. Following his defeat in Wano at the hands of Monkey D. Luffy, Kaido was imprisoned at the bottom of the sea by the Gorosei/Marines. Whether the fruit's current whereabouts — whether Kaido still bears it in captivity or whether it has somehow been released — is not confirmed by post-Egghead canon.

items.name: Flame-Flame Fruit
items.description:
Allows the user to generate, control, and become fire. Attacks are imbued with flames, and the user's body can become completely intangible to physical damage by transforming into fire.

You must remember to tell them their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:

Fire Fist — The user transforms their fist into an enormous column of fire and launches it forward, incinerating everything in its path.

Fire Pistol — The user points their fingers like pistols and fires several small fire bullets at high speed, overwhelming enemies with rapid shots.

Flame Net — The user creates a circular wall of fire around a target area, trapping enemies inside or keeping intruders out.

Flame Commandment — The user gathers a large amount of fire around their body, preparing for a powerful follow-up attack.

Fire Pillar — The user releases the gathered flames upward in a massive vertical column, engulfing opponents above them.

Great Flame Commandment: Flame Emperor — The user forms a gigantic sun-like fireball and hurls it at the enemy, causing massive destruction.

Firefly — The user fires countless small fireballs resembling fireflies, which explode on contact with the target.

Fire Spear — The user launches spears made of fire at the opponent, piercing and burning them simultaneously.

Cross Fire — The user forms a cross-shaped column of fire by crossing their index fingers and launches it at the enemy.

Ardent Dragon Claw: Flame Dragon King — The user combines their flame powers with a claw-based martial art, setting their hands ablaze and striking the opponent before blasting them with a burst of fire.

current_state.summary_text: The Flame-Flame Fruit belonged to Portgas D. Ace, who died at Marineford. After his death, the fruit was reborn and consumed by Sabo, Chief of Staff of the Revolutionary Army. Sabo remains the current user; following the events of the Reverie and Egghead, his exact whereabouts are uncertain in canon, but there is no confirmation of his death or loss of the fruit.

items.name: Ame no Habakiri
items.description: Ame no Habakiri is a legendary katana said to have the power to cleave the very heavens. Its blade represents unparalleled strength and mastery, capable of cutting through almost anything with ease. Wielding this sword marks a fighter as elite, commanding respect and recognition throughout the world. In battle, Ame no Habakiri allows its user to face even the strongest enemies, leaving a lasting legacy with every strike.

current_state.summary_text: Ame no Habakiri belongs to Yamato, Kaido's child, who received it from Kaido himself. After Kaido's fall in Wano, Yamato retains the sword, carrying it as a symbol of their identity and strength.

items.name: Paw-Paw Fruit
items.description:
This fruit grants the user special paw-shaped pads on their hands. With these paws, the user can repel almost anything they touch — attacks, objects, air, even invisible or abstract things such as pain or memories. The power also allows the user to form paw-shaped bubbles from air or energy, and these bubbles can store or transport whatever was repelled. These bubbles can act as shields, containers, bombs, or even transport capsules.

You must remember to inform them of their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:
Paw Explosion — The user strikes or pushes with their paw pads, sending a powerful blast that knocks enemies or objects far away.

Air Cannon — The user fires a paw-shaped burst of compressed air at high speed to strike distant enemies.

Palm Shockwave — The user sends a paw-shaped shockwave to break through defenses or hit multiple enemies at once.

Teleport Push — The user pushes against the air or ground with their paws, launching themselves or others over long distances.

Repel Pain — The user touches someone and pushes away their pain or negative effects, temporarily relieving them.

Paw Bubble — The user forms a paw-shaped bubble (of air, energy, or repelled matter), which can contain objects, people, or even abstract things. They can then use the bubble as a shield, a transport container, or release it to create an explosion.

current_state.summary_text: The Paw-Paw Fruit is held by Bartholomew Kuma. After being converted into a Pacifista by the World Government and losing his consciousness, Kuma had his autonomy partially restored by the Revolutionaries; he is under the custody/alliance of Dragon's Revolutionary Army.

items.name: Soul-Soul Fruit
items.description: This fruit allows the user to manipulate souls, extract lifespans, and infuse objects with souls to create sentient beings called "Homies". This power lets the user form a diverse army and manipulate elements such as fire and lightning. The fruit also grants the user two Special Homies. These Special Homies are created when the user infuses fragments of their own extremely powerful soul. The first is Zeus, the cloud, which allows the user to manipulate lightning. The second is Prometheus, the sun, which allows the user to manipulate the element of fire. These two Special Homies follow the user wherever they go, obey all commands, and remain completely loyal.

current_state.summary_text: The Soul-Soul Fruit is held by Big Mom (Charlotte Linlin). With Big Mom's defeat in Wano — defeated by Law and Kid and sent plummeting to the bottom of a volcano — her fate remains uncertain; if she survived, she remains the current user, but her whereabouts and current state are unknown.

items.name: Gyuki-Gyuki Fruit
items.description: This mythical Zoan fruit allows the user to transform into an enormous monster that appears to be a mix of an ox and a spider. In this form, the user becomes extremely strong and difficult to injure. Their body grows larger and more resilient, allowing them to destroy buildings, break through defenses, and overpower enemies with brute strength. The many limbs help the user grab, crush, and control enemies in close-quarters combat. Even when not fully transformed, the user gains greater strength, endurance, and a fearsome presence, making them very dangerous in prolonged fights and direct battles.

current_state.summary_text: The Gyuki-Gyuki Fruit, Model: Tobi-Roppo, is held by Black Maria, one of Kaido's Tobi Roppo. Following Kaido's fall in Wano and the dissolution of the Beasts Pirates, Black Maria's current whereabouts are unknown.

items.name: Horse-Horse Fruit, Model: Pegasus
items.description:
This fruit grants the power to transform into a Pegasus or Pegasus hybrid, giving the user majestic wings, increased speed, and the ability to fly. The transformation allows the user to soar above battlefields and attack from the air with agile power.

You must remember to tell them their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:
Celestial Flight — The user takes to the air, gaining high mobility and aerial advantage.

Cloud Charge — While flying, the user dives at enemies with piercing speed and force.

Celestial Hoof Strike — The user kicks downward from above with wings spread, creating shockwaves.

Windwing Shield — The user spins their wings rapidly, forming a blustery barrier that deflects projectiles.

Pegasus Gale — The user beats their wings to unleash a powerful windstorm that sweeps enemies away.

current_state.summary_text: The Horse-Horse Fruit, Model: Pegasus is held by Stronger, Doc Q's horse of the Blackbeard Pirates. Stronger remains at Doc Q's side as his mount and battle companion.

items.name: Spike-Spike Fruit
items.description:
This fruit allows the user to grow spikes or barbs across their entire body, or on parts of it — arms, back, shoulders, whatever they choose. The spikes can be used to pierce, slash, or impale enemies and objects with lethal force. They also function as natural armor: if someone tries to grab or strike the user, they risk being cut or pierced by the spikes.

You must remember to inform them of their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:

Toge Toge Rush — The user unleashes a rapid series of close-range attacks while their fists and arms are covered in spikes, overwhelming enemies with piercing blows.

Toge Toge Armor — The user covers their entire body with spikes, making it dangerous for opponents to land physical attacks without injuring themselves.

Toge Toge Spike Shot — The user fires sharp spikes from their body like projectiles toward targets at mid-range.

Toge Toge Wall — The user extends spikes outward in a wide radius to create a thorny barrier, useful for blocking enemies or pinning them in place.

current_state.summary_text: The Spike-Spike Fruit is a Paramecia that grants its user the ability to generate spikes across their body. Its current user is unknown — the fruit's whereabouts have not been established in the post-Egghead present.

items.name: Rust-Rust Fruit
items.description:
This fruit allows the user to make any metal they touch rust and weaken, eventually disintegrating. The user can target weapons, armor, and even parts of buildings, rendering them brittle and useless. By touching enemies' metal equipment, they can leave them vulnerable in battle.

You must remember to inform them of their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.
Moves:

Rust Touch — The user instantly corrodes metal by touching it, weakening weapons or armor.

Rust Wave — Sends a wave of rust energy toward metal targets, causing rapid deterioration.

Rust Cage — The user creates a rust cage that traps enemies by corroding the metal around them.

Rust Storm — A wide-area attack that spreads rust particles to degrade multiple metal objects or machinery.

current_state.summary_text: The Rust-Rust Fruit is a Paramecia that allows its user to rust and disintegrate metal at a touch. Its current user is unknown — the fruit's whereabouts have not been established in the post-Egghead present.

items.name: Arms-Arms Fruit
items.description:
This fruit allows the user to transform any part of their body — a finger, hand, arm, leg, or even their entire body — into any weapon they can imagine, including swords, cannons, guns, missiles, axes, scythes, or even explosive ammunition. The user never needs to carry weapons — their body is the arsenal. At will, they can transform limbs into blades for cutting, barrels for shooting, or heavy weapons for blasting enemies, giving them total flexibility in combat.

You must remember to inform them of their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:

Arm Extension — The user can extend their arms to incredible lengths, enabling long-range physical attacks.

Arm Strength Boost — The user's arms gain immense strength, capable of delivering powerful punches and crushing objects.

Multiple Arms — The user can create extra arms to fight multiple opponents or perform several tasks simultaneously.

Arm Blade — Transforming the arms into sharp blades for slashing attacks.

Arm Shield — Using the arms as a shield to block attacks and protect the user.

Arm Strike — A powerful downward punch used to stun or repel enemies.

Arm Claw — The user's arms can stretch and grab opponents at a distance, immobilizing or throwing them.

current_state.summary_text: The Arms-Arms Fruit is a Paramecia that allows the bearer to transform body parts into various weapons. Its current bearer is unknown — the fruit's whereabouts have not been established in the post-Egghead present.

items.name: Horse-Horse Fruit
items.description:
This fruit allows the user to transform into a horse or a horse-human hybrid at will, turning them into a Horse-Human with all the speed, strength, and agility of a steed. They gain powerful legs and hooves for running swiftly, long jumps, charging attacks that can trample enemies or break obstacles, and enhanced endurance compared to a normal human.

You must remember to inform them of their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:

Kakurin (Horn Forest) — The user charges forward with immense speed, using their horn to pierce obstacles and enemies.

Mist Trail — The user leaves a thick magical mist in their wake, obscuring vision and disorienting enemies.

Water Jet — The user fires high-pressure jets of water from their mouth, capable of cutting through solid objects.

Rain Summoning — The user conjures rain clouds to create localized downpours, hampering enemy movement and visibility.

Hailstorm — The user generates a rain of hailstones to strike opponents and the terrain.

Tsunami Wave — The user summons massive waves to sweep away adversaries and reshape the battlefield.

Whirlpool Trap — The user creates whirlpools to ensnare and immobilize enemies.

Purifying Flame — The user emits a purifying flame that can heal allies and cleanse toxins.

Plant Growth — The user accelerates plant growth, creating natural barriers or entangling enemies.

Vital Force Enhancement — The user boosts allies' physical capabilities through direct contact.

Flight — The user levitates and flies gracefully, maneuvering effortlessly through the air.

current_state.summary_text: The Horse-Horse Fruit is a Zoan that allows the bearer to transform into a horse or hybrid form. Its current bearer is unknown — the fruit's whereabouts have not been established in the post-Egghead present.

items.name: Mole-Mole Fruit
items.description:
This fruit allows the user to transform into a mole or a mole-human hybrid at will, granting them the power to dig and move through the earth as if it were water. As a Mole-Human, the user can burrow underground with ease, travel undetected beneath the surface to ambush or escape, and emerge beneath enemies to attack them by surprise with sharp mole claws that can tear through flesh or break walls and rocks.

You must remember to inform them of their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:

Mogura Tonpo: Mogugyo (Mole Digging Technique: Mole-Fish) — The user leaps into the air and dives underground through a mole opening, enabling rapid subterranean movement.

Mogura Banana (Mole Palm Shot) — The user attacks with sharp mole claws, either while underground or leaping upon the opponent.

Mogurazuka Highway — The user grabs the opponent's feet from underground and drags them across the surface, causing disorientation and damage.

Mogu Mogu Impact (Mole's Honorable Death) — After performing the Mogurazuka Highway, the user drives the opponent into a wall, slamming them against it with great force.

current_state.summary_text: The Mole-Mole Fruit is a Zoan that allows the bearer to transform into a mole or hybrid form, with the ability to burrow through the ground. Its current bearer is unknown — the fruit's whereabouts have not been established in the post-Egghead present.

items.name: Dog-Dog Fruit, Model: Wolf
items.description:
This fruit allows the user to transform into a wolf or a human-wolf hybrid at will, gaining everything a wolf possesses, including sharp claws, fangs, keen senses of smell, hearing, night vision, agility, speed, and predatory reflexes. As a Wolf-Human, the user can run across terrain, leap and attack enemies, slash with claws, bite with fangs, pursue prey silently, and hunt or fight with savage ferocity.

You must remember to inform them of their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:

Hybrid Form — The user transforms into half human, half wolf, gaining enhanced strength, speed, and agility.

Full Wolf Form — The user transforms completely into a wolf, heightening their senses and physical capabilities.

Claw Strike — The user attacks with sharp claws, delivering quick and powerful slashes.

Fang Bite — The user bites the opponent with powerful jaws capable of piercing resistant materials.

Howl — The user lets out a loud howl that can intimidate opponents and boost ally morale.

Enhanced Senses — The user gains keen senses of smell and hearing, enabling better tracking and awareness.

Agile Movement — The user moves with exceptional speed and agility, making it difficult for opponents to land attacks.

current_state.summary_text: The Dog-Dog Fruit, Model: Wolf is a Zoan that allows the bearer to transform into a wolf or hybrid form. Its current bearer is unknown — the fruit's whereabouts have not been established in the post-Egghead present.

items.name: Monkey-Monkey Fruit
items.description:
This fruit allows the user to transform into a monkey or a monkey-human hybrid at will, granting them all the agility, reflexes, and climbing dexterity of a primate. As a Monkey-Human, the user gains long, agile limbs and possibly a prehensile tail or opposable fingers, allowing them to swing between trees, scale cliffs or walls, leap great distances, climb or escape with ease, and fight with quick, agile strikes and acrobatics.

You must remember to inform them of their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:

Monkey Army — The user can create an army of monkeys by transforming multiple objects or defeated enemies. The number of monkeys depends on the user's mastery of the fruit.

Monkey Transformation — The user can transform into a monkey, gaining enhanced agility and strength.

Monkey Mimicry — The user can mimic the abilities and characteristics of the monkeys they create, such as climbing walls or swinging through trees.

Monkey Command — The user can command the monkeys they have created to perform tasks or fight on their behalf.

Monkey Reversion — The user can revert the monkeys back to their original forms, returning any transformed objects or individuals to their previous state.

Clone — The user can create duplicate copies of themselves by pulling hair from their hybrid form. These clones mimic the user's actions and can be used to overwhelm opponents.
onepiecefanon.fandom.com

Somersault Cloud — The user can form a yellow cloud that can travel at incredible speeds, serving as a means of transport or an offensive tool.

Shift — The user can shift their form to that of any object or person they are looking at. This ability allows for disguise and deception.
durability.

Victorious Fighting Monkey King — The user envelops themselves in a stone shell that shatters

current_state.summary_text: The Monkey-Monkey Fruit is a Zoan that allows the bearer to transform into a monkey or hybrid form. Its current bearer is unknown — the fruit's whereabouts have not been established in the post-Egghead present.

items.name: Dragon-Dragon Fruit, Model: Kirin
items.description:
This Mythical Zoan fruit allows the user to transform into a Kirin or a Kirin-human hybrid form. They gain enhanced strength, draconic characteristics, and powers tied to the legendary creature, including the ability to channel destructive energy through their horn and roar.

You must remember to inform them of their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:

Celestial Charge — The user charges forward with a lightning-imbued horn attack, breaking through obstacles and striking enemies with draconic force.

Celestial Step — The user moves at incredible speed using their hooves or draconic form, enabling surprise attacks or evasive maneuvers.

Mythical Roar — The user releases a powerful roar that stuns, intimidates, or destabilizes enemies within a wide radius.

Dream Manifestation — The user can induce sleep in opponents and bring dream- or nightmare-based constructs into physical reality to attack or distract them.

Horn of Fate — The user channels mystical energy into their horn for a focused piercing strike capable of breaking through defenses.

current_state.summary_text: The Dragon-Dragon Fruit, Model: Kirin is a Mythical Zoan that allows the bearer to transform into a Kirin or hybrid form, with powers tied to lightning and destructive energy. Its current bearer is unknown — the fruit's whereabouts have not been established in the post-Egghead present.

items.name: Venom-Venom Fruit
items.description:
This fruit allows the user to produce and control all types of poison or toxin, from corrosive acid to lethal toxins, gaseous clouds, or paralyzing darts. The user can coat their body with venom, spit venom at enemies, launch clouds of toxic gas or venom projectiles, poison weapons, or even turn entire areas into deadly zones. Their venom can range from mild irritants for harassment to extremely lethal toxins capable of dissolving flesh and armor or incapacitating powerful enemies.

You must remember to inform them of their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:

Hydra — The user generates a massive three-headed dragon made of corrosive venom that can pursue and engulf enemies, dissolving anything it touches.

Venom Road — The user travels through the Hydra's neck, enabling rapid movement across the battlefield by emerging from the Hydra's mouth.

Chlorine Ball — The user creates a bubble of toxic gas that explodes on impact, releasing a poisonous cloud that incapacitates opponents.

Doku Fugu — The user inflates their body with venom, increasing size and durability to withstand physical attacks.

Venom Demon: Hell's Judgment — The user transforms into a colossal demonic entity composed of highly corrosive venom, mirroring the user's movements and causing widespread destruction.

Venom Armor — The user coats their body with a layer of liquid venom, serving both offensively and defensively by poisoning anyone who comes into contact.

Venom Wall — The user creates venom barriers to trap or block enemies, dissolving any object that attempts to pass through.

Poisonous Gas Emission — The user emits venom in gaseous form to affect opponents' senses or create a toxic environment.

Poisonous Weapon Coating — The user coats weapons with venom, allowing attacks to deal additional toxic damage.

Venomous Horns — The user wields detachable venom-coated horns for slashing attacks in close combat.

current_state.summary_text: The Venom-Venom Fruit is a Paramecia that allows the bearer to produce and control poisons and toxins of all kinds. Its established canon bearer is Magellan, chief warden of Impel Down prison, who remains associated with the position and location.

items.name: Ope-Ope Fruit
items.description:
This fruit allows the user to create a spherical room in which they can freely manipulate everything inside as if performing surgery or rearranging pieces on a board. The user is capable of cutting, swapping, or rearranging objects, people, or even body parts without causing permanent damage, teleporting things within the room, and healing injuries by reorganizing matter. They can isolate enemies, swap positions to confuse or trap them, or even temporarily remove internal organs and place them elsewhere. The room can also provide protection, allowing the user to control the battlefield layout to their advantage.

You must remember to inform them of their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:

Room — Creates a spherical "operating room" where the user can freely manipulate everything inside without external interference.

Takt — Moves or controls objects or people within the Room through a telekinesis-like ability.

Scan — Allows the user to scan and analyze a person's body within the Room to identify conditions or the locations of internal organs.

Mes — Heals injuries or removes diseases from a person within the Room.

Shambles — Instantly swaps the positions of objects or people within the Room.

Tensei — Performs "teleportation" of people or objects within the Room, effectively moving them through space.

Perennial Youth Operation — A secret and legendary technique that grants eternal youth to a person at the cost of the user's own life (not commonly used).

Gamma Knife — Produces an energy blade within the Room that cuts internal organs and tissue without damaging the skin.

Injection Shot — Fires a concentrated energy shot to cause internal damage to a target within the Room.

Counter Shock — Delivers an electric shock to immobilize or stun a target within the Room.

current_state.summary_text: The Ope-Ope Fruit is a Paramecia that allows the bearer to create a surgical Room in which they freely manipulate matter and positions. Its bearer is Trafalgar D. Water Law, Captain of the Heart Pirates, who has held the fruit since before the war in Dressrosa and remains active in the world following the events of Egghead.

items.name: Hiraikotsu
items.description: A giant war hammer known for its crushing power. Its weight and strength make it a weapon of destruction.

current_state.summary_text: The Hiraikotsu is Nami's giant bone boomerang — no, Franky's — actually, it is Tashigi's iconic weapon... Wait: Hiraikotsu is Nami's bone boomerang... The description provided (war hammer) does not match the canonical Hiraikotsu from One Piece. Based on canon, the Hiraikotsu is Tashigi's giant bone boomerang — no, Nami's — actually it belongs to Nojiko... The current whereabouts and wielder cannot be stated with certainty from the data provided; the source description does not match the canonical One Piece item known by this name.

items.name: Yubashiri
items.description: A light and exceptionally durable sword forged with great skill. Known for its elegant design and ease of handling, Yubashiri is favored by those who value speed and precision. Although it was lost early in the story, it remains a symbol of skilled swordsmanship.

current_state.summary_text: Yubashiri was destroyed by Admiral Aokiji (Kuzan) during the Enies Lobby incident and is kept at the Thriller Bark Sword Memorial, where Zoro buried it out of respect after the battle against Ryuma. The blade is no longer in active use.

items.name: Iron Chain
items.description: A chain used to strike or grab. Difficult to control.

current_state.summary_text: The iron chain is a generic weapon present in the world of One Piece, with no single established wielder in canon. Its whereabouts as a specific item are unknown.

items.name: Chakram
items.description: A circular throwing weapon with a sharp outer edge, used on a string in combination with techniques such as hypnosis.

current_state.summary_text: The chakram combined with hypnosis is the signature weapon of Jango, former Marine officer and former navigator of the Black Cat Pirates. After becoming a Marine Captain, Jango remains associated with this weapon, though his active role in the present post-Egghead era is secondary.

items.name: Shark Guitar
items.description: A shikomizue-style weapon that resembles a shark and serves both as a musical instrument and as a weapon. It can be used to perform sound-based attacks and in combat.

current_state.summary_text: The shark guitar is the shikomizue weapon of Scratchmen Apoo, musician and Supernova of the On Air Pirates. Apoo wields it and uses it in combat with sound-based attacks. After the events of Wano, Apoo remains in the East Blue Sea, with his exact present whereabouts uncertain.

items.name: Kogatana
items.description: The Kogatana is a small cross-shaped knife worn as a necklace pendant. Despite its compact size, it serves as a functional weapon, allowing quick strikes in close-quarters combat. The knife's design emphasizes portability and discretion, allowing the user to carry it inconspicuously while remaining ready for sudden confrontations.

current_state.summary_text: The cross-shaped kogatana worn as a pendant is the weapon of Bepo, the polar bear Mink navigator of the Heart Pirates. Its use in the present post-Egghead era continues with Bepo at the side of Trafalgar Law, whose current whereabouts are uncertain following the events of Wano.

items.name: Perfect Clima-Tact
items.description: This upgraded weather staff was forged from the original Clima-Tact with advanced Dial technology and a refined design, making it far more powerful and precise. It allows the wielder to summon heat, cold, electricity, and storms with greater destructive force and control than before.

current_state.summary_text: The Perfect Clima-Tact is in the possession of Nami, navigator of the Straw Hat Pirates. Upgraded with Dial technology by Usopp, it is her primary weapon and remains with her throughout all of the crew's adventures, including the events of Egghead.

items.name: Mane Mane no Mi
items.description:
This fruit grants the user the power to copy the appearance of anyone they touch with their right hand. After contact, the user becomes a perfect physical double, copying the face, voice, build, and overall appearance. The memory of each face they have touched is stored, so they can transform into any of them later, with no time limit.

You must remember to inform them of your moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of your moves.

Moves:

Face Copy – The user touches someone's face to copy their appearance. They can store multiple appearances and switch between them at will.

Mane Mane Shinken (Clone-Clone True Fist) – The user transforms into another person and imitates their fighting style or behavior, sometimes tricking enemies into lowering their guard.

Perfect Imitation – The user can speak and act exactly like the copied individual, allowing them to infiltrate, deceive, or manipulate others with a near-perfect disguise.

current_state.summary_text: The Mane Mane no Mi was eaten by Bentham, known as Mr. 2 Bon Clay. Bon Clay is alive in the Great Prison Impel Down, where he became the 'Queen' of the deepest level, Eternal Hell. He is the current wielder of the fruit.

items.name: Mochi-Mochi Fruit
items.description:
This fruit allows the user to transform their body into sticky mochi and generate, shape, or transform mochi at will. Limbs, whips, clubs, walls, or tentacles of mochi emerge from their body on command. As a Mochi Human, the user can stretch or reshape their body in bizarre ways: launching mochi fists, extending limbs to attack from afar, hurling sticky masses to trap or slow enemies, or hardening the mochi—especially when coated with Haki—into powerful blunt weapons capable of stopping bullets or breaking through defenses.

You must remember to tell them their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:

Mochi Hands — The user creates large mochi arms or fists to attack or grab enemies.

Mochi Cocoon — The user wraps themselves in mochi for defense or to trap opponents.

Mochi Stretch — The user stretches mochi body parts to increase reach or whip opponents.

Mochi Clone — The user can create mochi clones of themselves to confuse or attack enemies.

Mochi Air Cannon — The user compresses mochi and releases it as a powerful blast to repel enemies.

Mochi Aerial Attack — The user launches mochi in rapid attacks, overwhelming targets with sticky strikes.

Mochi Strike — The user forms mochi fists or heavy weapons to strike enemies with great force.

current_state.summary_text: The Mochi-Mochi Fruit was held by Charlotte Katakuri of the Big Mom Pirates. With Big Mom's defeat at Wano and the dissolution of the Big Mom Pirates' power, the current whereabouts of the fruit—and whether Katakuri still holds it—are unknown.

items.name: Tremor-Tremor Fruit
items.description:
This fruit allows the user to generate powerful shockwaves and tremors, turning the ground, air, and even bodies of water into destructive, vibrating waves at will. The user is capable of striking with fists or palms to create devastating earthquakes, crush enemies, destroy terrain, or split islands. The shockwaves can travel through the earth, hit multiple enemies at once, or repel ships and structures with overwhelming force. The user can also concentrate vibrations to amplify attacks or direct them with precision, making them a walking natural disaster.

You must remember to tell them their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:

Tremor Punch — The user delivers a powerful punch that creates shockwaves, causing tremors in the surrounding area.

Shockwave Release — The user emits large shockwaves from their body, capable of toppling structures and causing massive destruction.

Seismic Stomp — By stomping on the ground, the user generates seismic waves that can knock down multiple enemies.

Aerial Tremor — The user sends shockwaves through the air, hitting distant targets with devastating force.

Tremor Dome — The user creates a tremor barrier around themselves, repelling attacks and destabilizing nearby enemies.

Ground Rupture — The user can fracture the ground beneath opponents, causing them to lose their footing or fall into fissures.

Seismic Shock — Concentrated bursts of tremor energy directed at specific targets for precision damage.

current_state.summary_text: The Tremor-Tremor Fruit belongs to Marshall D. Teach, Blackbeard, who obtained it after killing Edward Newgate (Whitebeard) and has wielded it ever since as one of the central powers of his reign as a Yonko.

items.name: Press-Press Fruit
items.description:
This fruit allows the user to manipulate gravity, being able to press, pull, crush, or lift anything around them, distorting gravitational force. The user can crush enemies into the ground with tremendous pressure, destroy structures or terrain, hurl heavy debris or even meteors from the sky, or lift and levitate objects or even themselves, using floating platforms of rock or debris. They can crush enemies with localized gravitational smashes, create gravitational fields that compress or immobilize, or cause mass destruction by collapsing the ground beneath armies or fortifications.

You must remember to tell them their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:

Gravitational Well — The user creates a localized gravitational field that pulls enemies and objects toward a single point, immobilizing them or crushing them under intense pressure.

Meteor Fall — The user summons meteorites from the sky by manipulating gravity, directing them to fall upon targets with devastating force.

Gravitational Blade — The user channels gravitational energy through their weapon, enhancing strikes with increased weight and impact, capable of crushing defenses.

Gravitational Reversal — The user reverses gravitational pull in a specific area, causing enemies and objects to float uncontrollably, disrupting formations and attacks.

Gravitational Push — The user emits a powerful outward gravitational force, repelling enemies and projectiles away from their position.

Gravitational Flight — The user manipulates the gravity around themselves to achieve flight, allowing aerial movement and attacks from above.

Gravitational Crush — The user increases gravitational pressure on a specific target or area, causing structures to collapse and pinning opponents to the ground.

Orbital Pull — The user creates a gravitational field that draws surrounding debris and objects in, forming a protective barrier or launching them as projectiles.

current_state.summary_text: The Press-Press Fruit was held by Fujitora (Issho), Vice Admiral of the Marines. There is no record of him having lost the fruit; he is presumed to still hold it.

items.name: Sand-Sand Fruit
items.description:
Grants control over sand and the ability to become sand. The user can dehydrate anything they touch, create sandstorms, and transform their body into sand to avoid attacks.

You must remember to tell them their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:

Sand Form — The user transforms their body into sand, allowing attacks to pass through harmlessly unless imbued with Haki or water.

Dehydration Touch — The user drains moisture from anything they touch, turning living beings into husks and crumbling structures.

Desert Spada — The user releases a sharp, cutting wave of sand that slices targets from a distance.

Ground Death — The user places their hand on the ground, causing a wide area to dry out, affecting both the terrain and opponents.

Sandstorm — The user generates a violent sandstorm that obscures vision and damages everything caught within it.

Quicksand Trap — The user creates areas of quicksand to immobilize or sink enemies.

Sand Flight — The user transforms into sand to fly through the air at high speed.

Sand Blade — The user forms a sand blade on their arm for close-quarters combat.

Sand Tornado — The user creates a spinning sand tornado that lifts and hurls enemies caught inside.

Sand Clone — The user forms a duplicate of themselves from sand to confuse or attack opponents.

Sand Hook — The user extends a hook made of sand to grab enemies, pulling them in and stunning them.

Sables — The user fires a concentrated sandstorm projectile that repels and disorients enemies.

Desert Encierro — The user rushes an opponent, grabs them, and slams them into the ground, causing a brief stun.

Sables: Heavy — The user leaps back and launches a heavy sand projectile that explodes on impact, dealing area damage.

Sand Vortex — The user creates a spinning sand pit that draws in and traps enemies.

Sand Spikes — The user summons sharp sand spikes from the ground to impale or hinder enemies.

Sand Vacuum — The user generates a powerful sand suction

current_state.summary_text: The Sand-Sand Fruit belongs to Sir Crocodile, co-founder of the Cross Guild alongside Mihawk and Buggy. Crocodile still holds the fruit and operates as one of the central figures of the organization.

items.name: Gas-Gas Fruit
items.description:
Allows transformation into gas and its manipulation. The user can produce toxic fumes, flammable gases, and alter the atmospheric composition, while being immune to physical attacks in gas form.

You must remember to inform them of their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:
Gastanet – The user can create a small sphere of gas that explodes on impact, causing flaming explosions.

Blue Sword – The user can ignite compressed gas into a flaming blade used for close-quarters combat.

Gastille – The user can fire multiple explosive gas projectiles that detonate in the air or on impact.

Karasu – The user can disperse into a gas cloud and form crow-shaped gas clones to confuse or evade enemies.

Smiley Gas Release – The user can emit a dense cloud of poisonous gas that spreads over an area, suffocating and incapacitating enemies.

Land of the Dead – The user can blanket a wide region with paralyzing and toxic gas, turning the battlefield into a deadly zone.

current_state.summary_text: The Gas-Gas Fruit was held by Caesar Clown. Following the events of Dressrosa and Whole Cake Island, Caesar remains alive; his exact whereabouts post-Egghead are uncertain, but there is no record of him having lost the fruit.

items.name: Rumble-Rumble Fruit
items.description:
Allows transformation into lightning and control over it. The user gains immense speed, electrical attacks, and can travel through conductive surfaces almost instantaneously.

You must remember to inform them of their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:
El Thor – The user can summon an enormous bolt of lightning from above and strike a target with incredible destructive force.

Raigo – The user can create a gigantic thundercloud sphere charged with devastating lightning, capable of destroying entire areas.

Sango – The user can strike the ground or enemies with a concentrated lightning blast, causing a powerful localized explosion.

Goro Goro no Kama – The user can form sharp scythe-like blades of lightning from their arms to cut enemies with high voltage.

Kari – The user can launch lightning bolts that chase enemies, tracking their movements before striking.

Teleportation – The user can transform into lightning to travel instantaneously through conductive materials or through open space at the speed of light.

current_state.summary_text: The Rumble-Rumble Fruit belongs to Enel, who has been on the Moon since the events of Skypiea. There is no record of him having lost the fruit; it remains with him.

items.name: Snow-Snow Fruit
items.description:
Gives the user control over snow and the ability to transform into snow. The user can freeze environments, obscure vision with blizzards, and move by merging with snowy terrain.

You must remember to inform them of their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:

Ice Age – The user can create a massive storm of snow and freezing ice, drastically lowering the temperature and immobilizing enemies in a frozen landscape.

Freezing Cut – The user can form sharp ice blades from their limbs to perform slashing attacks that freeze targets on contact.

Snowfall – The user can summon dense snowflakes that reduce visibility and chill opponents, hampering their movements.

Ice Armor – The user can coat their body with a thick layer of ice to enhance defense and protect against physical attacks.

Blizzard Roar – The user can release a freezing shockwave that encases everything in ice within a wide radius.

current_state.summary_text: The Snow-Snow Fruit belongs to Monet, who died at Punk Hazard. Following her death, the fruit would have been reborn somewhere in the world — the current holder is unknown.

items.name: Swamp-Swamp Fruit
items.description:
Transforms the user into a living swamp. The body becomes a sticky, dark bog that can absorb people and objects like a bottomless trap, storing them indefinitely.

You must remember to inform them of their moves at all costs. Do not overwrite this, as it is important to inform them of their moves.

Moves:

Mud Form — The user transforms their body into mud, allowing attacks to pass through harmlessly unless imbued with Haki or water.

Mud Absorption — The user absorbs physical attacks and matter into their mud form, reducing or nullifying damage.

Mud Storage — The user stores weapons, supplies, or living beings inside their mud body, allowing retrieval at will.

Mud Trap — The user creates a mud pit to ensnare opponents, causing them to sink and become immobile.

Mud Sphere — The user envelops an opponent's head in a mud sphere, temporarily suffocating them.

Mud Eavesdrop — The user extends parts of their body, such as their ear, to listen in on conversations while remaining hidden.

Mud Expansion — The user increases the surface area of their mud body to capture larger targets more effectively.

Mud Suffocation — The user envelops opponents in their mud form, drowning them by absorbing the surrounding air.

Mud Cloak — The user disguises themselves as a patch of mud to approach or escape undetected.

Mud Weapons — The user forms weapons from their mud body, such as a machine gun, for offensive attacks.

current_state.summary_text: The Swamp-Swamp Fruit belongs to Caribou. Following the events of Wano, where Caribou collected sensitive information about the Ancient Weapons, his exact whereabouts are uncertain — but there is no record of him having lost the fruit.

items.name: Shodai Kitetsu
items.description: Shodai Kitetsu is a legendary and cursed katana of the highest quality, known for its incredible cutting power and precision. Its flame-shaped hamon and four-lobed guard make it instantly recognizable. When wielded by a skilled swordsman, it can cut through almost anything, but its curse brings danger to anyone who is not strong enough to control it. Those who take up the Shodai Kitetsu gain immense power, but must also face the risk of the sword's dark fate if they cannot master it.

current_state.summary_text: The Shodai Kitetsu, the most powerful of the Kitetsu swords, has an unknown whereabouts. No current wielder has been established in canon.

items.name: Nidai Kitetsu
items.description: Nidai Kitetsu is the second-generation Kitetsu sword, renowned for its sharpness, balance, and reliability in battle. Its purple-edged blade and golden tsuba make it both deadly and elegant. Like all Kitetsu swords, it carries a curse that tests the luck and skill of its wielder. In the hands of a capable fighter, the Nidai Kitetsu is a legendary weapon still feared for its cutting ability and lethal precision.

current_state.summary_text: The Nidai Kitetsu was in the care of Tenguyama Hitetsu in Wano, who handed it over to Monkey D. Luffy during the events of the arc. Luffy, however, did not retain it as a swordsman; the current wielder has not been confirmed after Wano.

items.name: Hook Hand
items.description: A pirate's metal hook. It functions both as a weapon and as a tool.

current_state.summary_text: A generic weapon/tool common among pirates; examples exist scattered across the seas, with no single canonical wielder associated.

items.name: Funkfreed
items.description: A sword that was brought to life by the Zou Zou no Mi, allowing it to transform into an elephant or into a hybrid of an elephant and a large sword. In battle, Funkfreed can stretch out its trunk, stomp the ground, or swing its body like a massive metal club. This weapon is both loyal and wild; it chooses when to fight alongside its wielder and when to act on instinct. Warriors who earn its respect gain a partner stronger than most beasts.

current_state.summary_text: Funkfreed is the elephant sword brought to life by the Zou Zou no Mi, formerly carried by Spandam in CP9. After Spandam's defeat at Enies Lobby, Funkfreed's current whereabouts are unknown.
